subject: feat(ui): move search to header modal, revert dropdown flip, 50/50 split
body:
Search is now triggered from a header icon button and opens as a modal
overlay, giving full screen space for suggestions on mobile. Dropdown
direction reverted to downward (no longer needed since modal has room).
Map and station list now share equal vertical space (flex 1:1).
